source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive (EMEA)
source_jobs.description:
Are you ready to embark on a career that truly affects people around the world? Trulioo invites you to be a catalyst for change in the dynamic realm of digital identity verification. As the global front-runner in our industry, we are redefining how businesses grow, innovate and comply online.



Picture yourself at the forefront of innovation, contributing to our award-winning platform that enables organizations worldwide to quickly onboard customers, optimize costs and combat fraud. Fueled by Silicon Valley support, Trulioo stands as the trusted platform that can verify more than 5 billion people and 700 million business entities spanning 195 countries.



But Trulioo is more than a tech company. We are a united force of dedicated experts committed to establishing trust online - and we’re proud to be recognized as a BC Top Employer for the second consecutive year, reflecting our commitment to an inclusive, collaborative, and people-first workplace.



Headquartered in Vancouver and with strategic hubs in San Diego and Dublin, we foster a culture of collaboration and open communication. Our offices support a hybrid model and staff typically work three days per week at a hub location. Join us where excitement meets innovation and contribute to a world where trust and technology unite.



What We Offer

 - Comprehensive Benefits: We provide a robust benefits package for full-time, permanent employees, including health, dental, and vision coverage, retirement plans with company match, paid time off, parental leave, and an annual education & training stipend (equivalent to $1,000 in local currency). Specific benefits may vary by location and will be discussed further during the interview process.

 - Flexible Hybrid Working Environment: Our offices are designed to support both collaboration and flexibility. Enjoy weekly lunches, quality coffee, and regular social events. Many locations also feature parent rooms, on-site gyms, comfortable lounges, and adaptable workstations to support your comfort and productivity.

 - Wellness: We care about your well-being. Team members have access to wellness workshops and events, as well as a complimentary Headspace subscription to help you stay focused, grounded, and energized.

 - Employee Resource Groups: Belonging is an important part of doing your best work. Our ERGs provide an inclusive space, support and community for employees of diverse backgrounds and allies. We host informative, fun sessions and celebrations that are often open to the entire organization.
   
   


POSITION SUMMARY

As an Enterprise Account Executive, you will own the full sales cycle for high-value enterprise accounts focused on use cases across customer onboarding, identity verification, continuous monitoring, risk management, fraud prevention, and credit decisioning.



You will develop strategic relationships with senior stakeholders, uncover complex business challenges, and deliver customized Trulioo solutions that address key business requirements, including onboarding conversion, reduced fraud losses, enhanced compliance efficiency, and underwriting. This role requires a consultative approach, strong business acumen, and an ability to align identity and risk solutions with measurable enterprise outcomes.



This will be a full-time, permanent position and can be done remotely within the EMEA region for the right candidate.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

 - Identify, develop, and close new revenue opportunities with enterprise clients across key identity and risk use cases.

 - Lead multi-threaded, consultative sales cycles that engage multiple levels of decision-making within the buying center—from executives and compliance leaders to product, fraud, and technology stakeholders. Translate complex compliance and fraud-prevention challenges into actionable solutions that deliver business value.

 - Become an expert on the onboarding, risk, fraud, and credit domains, as well as Trulioo’s product portfolio, value prop

 - Employee Resource Groups: Belonging is an important part of doing your best work. Our ERGs provide an inclusive space, support and community for employees of diverse backgrounds and allies. We host informative, fun sessions and celebrations that are often open to the entire organization.
   
   


POSITION SUMMARY

The Head of EMEA Sales will own Trulioo’s go‑to‑market strategy, execution, and revenue performance across the EMEA region. They will lead and scale a high‑performing enterprise sales organization, drive new business and expansion revenue, and partner closely with Marketing, Product, and Customer Success to deliver sustainable, predictable growth.



This is a highly visible, hands‑on leadership role reporting to the Chief Revenue Officer, with responsibility for setting regional strategy, building the team, and ensuring rigorous operating discipline across the pipeline and forecast.

This individual will have extensive B2B sales experience and sales management experience, selling complex products to large enterprises.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

Sales strategy and revenue ownership

 - Develop and execute the EMEA sales strategy aligned to company growth objectives, target segments, and product roadmap.

 - Translate ARR and bookings targets into territory, segment, and rep‑level plans with clear quotas and activity expectations.

 - Own pipeline creation, progression, and conversion; ensure accurate forecasting and predictable delivery of quarterly and annual goals.

 - Use data to continuously refine territory design, coverage models, and sales motions to improve win rates and shorten sales cycles.

Leadership and team building

 - Build, lead, and develop a world‑class sales team, including account exe

POSITION SUMMARY

Trulioo is seeking a forward-thinking Total Rewards Specialist to join our People Team. Reporting to the Manager, People, this role combines core compensation expertise with a strong focus on data, automation, and scalable workflows. You will support the design and delivery of global total rewards programs while leveraging modern tools, AI, and process optimisation to improve efficiency, insight generation, and decision-making across the organisation. This role plays a key part in evolving our reward practices into a more data-driven, technology-enabled function.



This is a full-time, permanent position based in our Vancouver office, operating on a hybrid model (3 days per week in-office) but can be done remotely for the right candidate.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

Total Rewards & Program Delivery

 - Contribute to compensation activities including job leveling, market matching, and career framework support, applying AI-assisted tools where appropriate to accelerate analysis and improve consistency.

 - Support the setup and execution of annual compensation review cycles within compensation tools and People systems, identifying opportunities to automate or streamline manual steps.

 - Support salary benchmarking and analyse internal compensation data, participating in external remuneration surveys to support market competitiveness and internal equity.

source_jobs.title: Product & Privacy Counsel
source_jobs.description:
Are you ready to embark on a career that truly affects people around the world? Trulioo invites you to be a catalyst for change in the dynamic realm of digital identity verification. As the global front-runner in our industry, we are redefining how businesses grow, innovate and comply online.



Picture yourself at the forefront of innovation, contributing to our award-winning platform that enables organizations worldwide to quickly onboard customers, optimize costs and combat fraud. Fueled by Silicon Valley support, Trulioo stands as the trusted platform that can verify more than 5 billion people and 700 million business entities spanning 195 countries.



But Trulioo is more than a tech company. We are a united force of dedicated experts committed to establishing trust online - and we’re proud to be recognized as a BC Top Employer for the second consecutive year, reflecting our commitment to an inclusive, collaborative, and people-first workplace.



Headquartered in Vancouver and with strategic hubs in San Diego and Dublin, we foster a culture of collaboration and open communication. Our offices support a hybrid model and staff typically work three days per week at a hub location. Join us where excitement meets innovation and contribute to a world where trust and technology unite.



What We Offer

 - Comprehensive Benefits: We provide a robust benefits package for full-time, permanent employees, including health, dental, and vision coverage, retirement plans with company match, paid time off, parental leave, and an annual education & training stipend (equivalent to $1,000 in local currency). Specific benefits may vary by location and will be discussed further during the interview process.

 - Flexible Hybrid Working Environment: Our offices are designed to support both collaboration and flexibility. Enjoy weekly lunches, quality coffee, and regular social events. Many locations also feature parent rooms, on-site gyms, comfortable lounges, and adaptable workstations to support your comfort and productivity.

 - Wellness: We care about your well-being. Team members have access to wellness workshops and events, as well as a complimentary Headspace subscription to help you stay focused, grounded, and energized.

 - Employee Resource Groups: Belonging is an important part of doing your best work. Our ERGs provide an inclusive space, support and community for employees of diverse backgrounds and allies. We host informative, fun sessions and celebrations that are often open to the entire organization.
   
   

Position Summary

Trulioo seeks a highly motivated and talented Product & Privacy Counsel to join our growing Privacy Team. Reporting to the VP, Global Privacy & Data Protection, you will partner closely with Product, Engineering, and other business teams to provide practical, business-focused legal advice on product development, data use, and privacy compliance. You will play a key role in shaping privacy-by-design across Trulioo’s suite of identity verification and fraud prevention products and supporting Trulioo’s Global Privacy Program.



This will be a full-time, permanent position, preferably working out of the Vancouver office on a hybrid model (3 days per week in the office). However, this role could be done remotely for the right candidate.



What You’ll Be Doing:

 - Partner with Product & Engineering teams to identify and address legal and compliance risks throughout the product development lifecycle

 - Conduct privacy impact assessments (PIAs/DPIAs) for new products, features, and data processing activities

 - Provide guidance and support to the Commercial Legal Team regarding privacy & data protection issues in customer and supplier contracts

 - Monitor global privacy & data protection laws and regulatory trends, developments, and industry best practices

 - Maintain and update internal and external privacy and data protection policies, procedures, guidance, and other documentation

 - Support privacy audi

source_jobs.description:

What We Offer

 - Comprehensive Benefits: We provide a robust benefits package for full-time, permanent employees, including health, dental, and vision coverage, retirement plans with company match, paid time off, parental leave, and an annual education & training stipend (equivalent to $1,000 in local currency). Specific benefits may vary by location and will be discussed further during the interview process.

 - Flexible Hybrid Working Environment: Our offices are designed to support both collaboration and flexibility. Enjoy weekly lunches, quality coffee, and regular social events. Many locations also feature parent rooms, on-site gyms, comfortable lounges, and adaptable workstations to support your comfort and productivity.

 - Wellness: We care about your well-being. Team members have access to wellness workshops and events, as well as a complimentary Headspace subscription to help you stay focused, grounded, and energized.

 - Employee Resource Groups: Belonging is an important part of doing your best work. Our ERGs provide an inclusive space, support and community for employees of diverse backgrounds and allies. We host informative, fun sessions and celebrations that are often open to the entire organization.
   
   


POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a skilled Data Platform Engineer with a proven track record of innovation to design, build, and maintain robust data systems that power person and business search and verification services. The ideal candidate has experience integrating diverse data sources, developing scalable ETL pipelines, and applying ML techniques to improve data quality, entity resolution, and semantic search.



This role spans multiple data systems — relational, NoSQL, vector databases, search engines, and optionally graph databases — offering opportunities to tackle complex data challenges at scale.



This will be a full-time, permanent position, working out of the San Diego office on a hybrid model (3 days per week in the office).




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

 - Build, optimize, and maintain data ingestion and transformation pipelines from multiple sources (internal systems, vendor data, web data, APIs).

 - Design and implement data models using the most suitable tool for the task — SQL, NoSQL, GraphDBs, or VectorDBs.

 - Integrate machine learning models into pipelines for entity resolution, de-duplication, semantic enrichment, and embedding generation.

 - Work with Vector Databases (e.g., AWS S3 Vector, PostgresVectorDb, OpenSearch) to support similarity and semantic search applications.

 - Collaborate with data scientists, software engineers, and analysts to deliver reliable, high-performance data infrastruct

Many locations also feature parent rooms, on-site gyms, comfortable lounges, and adaptable workstations to support your comfort and productivity.

 - Employee Resource Groups: Belonging is an important part of doing your best work. Our ERGs provide an inclusive space, support and community for employees of diverse backgrounds and allies. We host informative, fun sessions and celebrations that are often open to the entire organization.
   
   


POSITION SUMMARY

Trulioo is hiring a Director, Solutions Consulting to lead our global strategy and manage our North America team. This is a technical leadership role at the intersection of deep field execution and organizational scale. You will personally drive our most complex enterprise evaluations while building the systems, standards, and team capacity that make that execution repeatable across the organization.



This is not a role for someone who manages through their team. You will be expected to step into live, high-stakes evaluations alongside your SCs, engage credibly at API and data level with enterprise technical stakeholders, and simultaneously build the frameworks that make the team less dependent on heroics. If your default is to delegate technical work and oversee from above, this is the wrong role.

You will report to the SVP of Global Solutions and own North America directly, while partnering with country managers in EMEA and APAC on global standards and consistency.



This will be a full-time, permanent position, ideally working out of the Vancouver office on a hybrid model (3 days per week in the office), but can be done remotely for the right person.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:


FIELD EXECUTION

 - Step into the largest and most complex enterprise deals, providing hands-on technical leadership alongside your SCs

 - Personally run and interpret batch evaluations: analyze API output, identify data qu

You’ll translate technical and business requirements into scalable solutions, lead technical engagements, and ensure customers realize maximum value from Trulioo’s platform. This is a hands-on, client-facing role for someone who enjoys deep technical problem-solving while influencing strategic outcomes.



This will be a full-time, permanent position working out of the Dublin office on a hybrid model (3 days per week in the office).




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

 - Engage with customers directly, acting as the key technical point of contact for our most strategic customers

 - Own the discovery process to uncover business objectives, customer technical requirements, run technical demonstrations and proof of concepts

 - Collaborate cross-functionally to deliver seamless customer outcomes

 - Contribute to internal knowledge and technical excellence




WHAT YOU’LL BRING:

Key Skills

 - Proven ability to simplify complex concepts, deliver effective product demonstrations, and communicate confidently with stakeh

We host informative, fun sessions and celebrations that are often open to the entire organization.
   
   


POSITION SUMMARY

Trulioo verifies businesses and the people behind them at global scale. Our Business Verification (KYB) product is the system enterprises and high-growth companies trust to onboard merchants, meet regulatory needs, and stop bad actors before they enter the platform - across 195+ countries, with the data, document, and watchlist coverage to back it.

We're hiring a Product Manager to own the strategy and roadmap for a core area of KYB - setting direction, leading discovery, and shipping new product classes that change how fast and how confidently our customers can onboard a business anywhere in the world. source_jobs.title: Solutions Consultant
source_jobs.description:
Are you ready to embark on a career that truly affects people around the world? Trulioo invites you to be a catalyst for change in the dynamic realm of digital identity verification. As the global front-runner in our industry, we are redefining how businesses grow, innovate and comply online.



Picture yourself at the forefront of innovation, contributing to our award-winning platform that enables organizations worldwide to quickly onboard customers, optimize costs and combat fraud. Fueled by Silicon Valley support, Trulioo stands as the trusted platform that can verify more than 5 billion people and 700 million business entities spanning 195 countries.



But Trulioo is more than a tech company. We are a united force of dedicated experts committed to establishing trust online - and we’re proud to be recognized as a BC Top Employer for the second consecutive year, reflecting our commitment to an inclusive, collaborative, and people-first workplace.



Headquartered in Vancouver and with strategic hubs in San Diego and Dublin, we foster a culture of collaboration and open communication. Our offices support a hybrid model and staff typically work three days per week at a hub location. Join us where excitement meets innovation and contribute to a world where trust and technology unite.



What We Offer

 - Comprehensive Benefits: We provide a robust benefits package for full-time, permanent employees, including health, dental, and vision coverage, retirement plans with company match, paid time off, parental leave, and an annual education & training stipend (equivalent to $1,000 in local currency). Specific benefits may vary by location and will be discussed further during the interview process.

 - Flexible Hybrid Working Environment: Our offices are designed to support both collaboration and flexibility. Enjoy weekly lunches, quality coffee, and regular social events. Many locations also feature parent rooms, on-site gyms, comfortable lounges, and adaptable workstations to support your comfort and productivity.

 - Wellness: We care about your well-being. Team members have access to wellness workshops and events, as well as a complimentary Headspace subscription to help you stay focused, grounded, and energized.

 - Employee Resource Groups: Belonging is an important part of doing your best work. Our ERGs provide an inclusive space, support and community for employees of diverse backgrounds and allies. We host informative, fun sessions and celebrations that are often open to the entire organization.
   
   


POSITION SUMMARY

Reporting to the Manager, Solutions Consulting, the Solutions Consultant partners with the revenue organization to understand customer requirements and design effective solutions using Trulioo’s platform. You will work closely with Account Executives with discovery and own solutioning and evaluations for mid-market customers. This includes translating business and technical requirements into clear, value-driven recommendations. This role builds foundational expertise in identity verification, presales execution, and customer engagement, with a path toward more complex opportunities.



This will be a full-time, permanent position working out of the Vancouver office on a hybrid model (3-days per week in the office).



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

 - Partner with Account Executives to lead discovery conversations, identifying customer business goals, technical requirements, and constraints

 - Own solution design, translating discovery insights into standardized recommendations and verification strategies

 - Lead product demonstrations aligned to customer use cases, improve our master templates over time with learnings

 - Own the setup and execution of proof of concepts and evaluations for mid-market opportunities

 - Partner with Account Executives to address technical questions and progress opportunities through the sales cycle

 - Collaborate with Customer Success, Service Delivery, Product, and Engineering

Product Strategy & Roadmap

Reporting to the Senior Director, Technology Infrastructure and Security, you will contribute to securing applications and infrastructure hosted in AWS. This will be a full-time, permanent position working out of the Vancouver office on a hybrid model (3 days per week in the office).




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

You will be a key resource within the Trulioo security team, supporting security capabilities across our cloud platform and application environment. The ideal candidate is a self-starter with strong experience in cloud and platform security, and a focus on building scalable, automated security solutions in AWS.

 - Wellness: We care about your well-being. Team members have access to wellness workshops and events, as well as a complimentary Headspace subscription to help you stay focused, grounded, and energized.

 - Employee Resource Groups: Belonging is an important part of doing your best work. Our ERGs provide an inclusive space, support and community for employees of diverse backgrounds and allies. We host informative, fun sessions and celebrations that are often open to the entire organization.
   
   


POSITION SUMMARY

Reporting to the Head of Customer Success for EMEA and APAC, the Senior Customer Success Manager is responsible for growing revenue across their account base by aligning customer needs, product capabilities, and use case fit. You’ll be relied upon for your entrepreneurial nature, technical aptitude, collaborative style, and ability to engage with high-profile customers in the Payments, e-Commerce, Finserv, and Technology verticals.



This is a full-time, permanent position working on a hybrid model out of our Singapore office.




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

 - Create and build strategic relationships with the largest and most innovative companies across the APAC region to drive revenue growth, increase customer loyalty, and product adoption

 - Manage existing products into new use cases and markets

 - Consistently communicate with decision-makers to understand their identity verification needs and business requirements

 - Manage multiple business units/opportunities within the same organization, with potentially different use-cases for each

 - Analyze and evaluate product performance metrics and technical optimization opportunities within the services platform

 - Navigate and negotiate contract changes, upgrades, and amendments

 - Deliver expansion in terms of revenue and product adoption across your book of business

 - Maintain communication and coordination with Sales, Marketing, Support, Product an

source_jobs.title: Corporate Controller
source_jobs.description:
Are you ready to embark on a career that truly affects people around the world? Trulioo invites you to be a catalyst for change in the dynamic realm of digital identity verification. As the global front-runner in our industry, we are redefining how businesses grow, innovate and comply online.



Picture yourself at the forefront of innovation, contributing to our award-winning platform that enables organizations worldwide to quickly onboard customers, optimize costs and combat fraud. Fueled by Silicon Valley support, Trulioo stands as the trusted platform that can verify more than 5 billion people and 700 million business entities spanning 195 countries.



But Trulioo is more than a tech company. We are a united force of dedicated experts committed to establishing trust online - and we’re proud to be recognized as a BC Top Employer for the second consecutive year, reflecting our commitment to an inclusive, collaborative, and people-first workplace.



Headquartered in Vancouver and with strategic hubs in San Diego and Dublin, we foster a culture of collaboration and open communication. Our offices support a hybrid model and staff typically work three days per week at a hub location. Join us where excitement meets innovation and contribute to a world where trust and technology unite.



What We Offer

 - Comprehensive Benefits: We provide a robust benefits package for full-time, permanent employees, including health, dental, and vision coverage, retirement plans with company match, paid time off, parental leave, and an annual education & training stipend (equivalent to $1,000 in local currency). Specific benefits may vary by location and will be discussed further during the interview process.

 - Flexible Hybrid Working Environment: Our offices are designed to support both collaboration and flexibility. Enjoy weekly lunches, quality coffee, and regular social events. Many locations also feature parent rooms, on-site gyms, comfortable lounges, and adaptable workstations to support your comfort and productivity.

 - Wellness: We care about your well-being. Team members have access to wellness workshops and events, as well as a complimentary Headspace subscription to help you stay focused, grounded, and energized.

 - Employee Resource Groups: Belonging is an important part of doing your best work. Our ERGs provide an inclusive space, support and community for employees of diverse backgrounds and allies. We host informative, fun sessions and celebrations that are often open to the entire organization.
   
   


ABOUT TRULIOO

Trulioo is the world's leading global identity verification, fraud, and risk management platform. We equip the world's leading companies to fight fraud and financial crime across the entire customer lifecycle, using AI-powered risk intelligence and a unified global data fabric spanning 195+ countries. Backed by top-tier growth equity investors, Trulioo is investing in its Finance function to match the scale and sophistication of the business.




POSITION SUMMARY

The Corporate Controller is a senior leadership hire and a critical partner to the CFO. This role owns the financial integrity of the business: the accounting infrastructure, the close process, the control environment, and the compliance posture across a dynamic, multi-entity, multi-national organization. You'll run the function with the discipline of a company preparing for a major liquidity event, while building at the pace and prioritization that a scaling business actually requires.



This is not a maintenance role. The right person will build institutional-grade infrastructure on a thoughtful timeline, use AI and automation to run a lean and high-output team, and operate as a genuine business partner alongside FP&A and the CFO. Trulioo is at a stage where the accounting function needs to keep pace with strategic ambition.



This will be a full-time, permanent position working out of the Vancouver office on a hybrid model (3 days per week in

POSITION SUMMARY

To continue to fuel our growth, we are seeking an Intermediate Software Engineer to join our KYB (Know Your Business) Engineering team. Trulioo's KYB team is responsible for building and enhancing our global business verification product, enabling customers to confidently verify companies and comply with regulatory requirements across jurisdictions.



Reporting to the Senior Development Manager, KYB, you will play a key role in delivering scalable, high-quality solutions, integrating with global data partners, and evolving our platform to meet the needs of a rapidly growing customer base. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to design and implement robust systems, while contributing to technical standards and mentoring junior engineers.



This will be a full-time, permanent position working out of the Vancouver office on a hybrid model (3 days per week in the office).




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

 - Design, develop, and deliver high-quality, end-to-end features within Trulioo's KYB product line.

 - Collaborate with Product, QA, DevOps, and other engineering teams to break down user stories into actionable tasks and deliver against planned releases.

 - Design scalable, robust, and reusable solutions based on business and technical requirements.

 - Build and maintain integrations with global data partners and third-party services.

 - Document and communicate technical designs and decisions

POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking an experienced Salesforce Administrator with deep, hands-on expertise in Salesforce CPQ to own and evolve our Salesforce platform end-to-end. Reporting to the Revenue Operations Manager, you'll be the subject matter expert responsible for platform configuration, delivery, and user enablement across Sales, Revenue Operations, Marketing, and Customer Success. You'll bring a track record of delivering scalable CPQ solutions, managing complex CRM environments, and driving measurable adoption across go-to-market teams.



This will be a full-time, permanent position, working out of the Dublin office on a hybrid model (3 days per week in the office).





WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

 - Serve as the primary Salesforce platform owner for Trulioo's Sales Cloud and CPQ environments, with full accountability from requirements through to delivery and adoption.

 - Lead end-to-end CPQ configuration and optimisation: products, bundles, pricing rules, discount schedules, quote templates, approval workflows, and order management.

 - Own the full delivery lifecycle for Salesforce projects — scoping, building, testing, deploying, and iterating — ensuring changes land on time and to a high standard.

 - Design and own the Salesforce enablement programme: develop training materials, run onboarding sessions for new hires, and deliver ongoing education to keep users across Sales, CS, and RevOps proficient and confid

POSITION SUMMARY

Reporting to the Director of IT, the Systems Administrator will be responsible for supporting the day-to-day reliability and performance of Trulioo's corporate technology stack. This role involves endpoint management, user support, SaaS administration, and onboarding, working hands-on with core IT tools alongside senior IT staff.



This will be a full-time, permanent position working out of the San Diego office on a hybrid model (3-days per week in the office).




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

 - Assist with Mac and PC laptop provisioning, imaging, configuration, and user-ready delivery; support patch management and software deployment across macOS (Jamf) and Windows (Intune)

 - Provision and deprovision user accounts across Google Workspace, Azure/Entra ID, and OneLogin; manage group memberships, MFA enrollment, and basic SSO application access

 - Support day-to-day administration of Google Workspace and Microsoft Azure, including SaaS platform configuration and licensing management

 - Support Mimecast email security monitoring and quarantine, apply policies, and escalate threats; help maintain IT documentation and evidence for audits and compliance reviews

 - Assist with basic Meraki troubleshooting (connectivity, wireless, switching) and escalate more complex network issues to senior staff

 - Provide responsive technical support for staff across global locations and time zones, and support new hire onb

notes: Trulioo has a strong sales presence, but still has a notable tech core.
